props.title: Custom Node Extension
props.description: A live docs example that registers CalloutNode in Nuxt and uses it in the renderer.

props.label: Renderer boots
props.description: The docs app loads a custom node definition before any Flaier example renders.

props.label: AI sees the new node
props.body: createFlaierCatalog({ nodes }) merges the CalloutNode schema into the prompt-facing catalog so generated specs can reference it deliberately.

props.label: Nuxt plugin registration
props.story: One registration makes the custom node available to FlaierClient, FlaierDemo, and FlaierMdc, including markdown-driven docs content.

props.label: Rendered inside FlowTimeline
props.body: This CalloutNode is a Vue Flow node component with its own handles, sizing hint, and summary hook. It renders alongside built-in TriggerNode, CodeNode, and LinkNode elements.
